form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 340m in 18.82 last start, beating Little Bit Super. Likes the rails so coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (19.42) at this track over 340m. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and she is facing a tougher line up. Needs to do more. Others better.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when eighth over 516m at Dubbo. Prior to that won by 0.8 lengths at Dubbo (29.37) beating Gets Late Early in a NG on November 15. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won his last four in a row including a strong win last start over 320m at Richmond by 2.25 lengths in a Free For All. In hot form and can take this out.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at this track. Others favoured this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced erratically in the home straight nearing the post.

form.formComment: Comes off a (19.12) win last time, scoring by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 3/4 over 340m at this track. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Makes appeal on best.
